chapters.title: Shapes and Space
chapters.desc: Identify shapes like circle, square, rectangle, triangle. Understand words: above/below, inside/outside.

chapters.title: Numbers from One to Nine
chapters.desc: Count and write how many objects are shown. Compare numbers.

chapters.title: Addition
chapters.desc: Add two single-digit numbers with pictures or objects.
chapters.practice: Ravi has 6 marbles. His friend gives him 3 more. How many marbles does Ravi have now?

chapters.title: Subtraction
chapters.desc: Take away from a group. Simple sums like 9 - 4.
chapters.practice: There are 8 apples. 3 are eaten. How many are left?

chapters.title: Numbers from Ten to Twenty
chapters.desc: Show tens and ones (e.g., 14 = 1 ten and 4 ones).

chapters.title: Time
chapters.desc: Read and draw clocks showing full hours (3 o'clock, 5 o'clock).

chapters.title: Numbers from Twenty-one to Fifty
chapters.desc: Recognizing and writing numbers up to 50.

chapters.title: Data Handling
chapters.desc: Count objects and mark tally or tick marks.

chapters.title: Numbers up to 99
chapters.desc: Place value tens/ones for numbers up to 99.

chapters.title: Money
chapters.desc: Recognize common Indian coins and notes.
chapters.practice: Which set of coins makes 5 rupees?

chapters.title: Literature
chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.title: Paint & Typing
chapters.desc: Using MS Paint, Keyboard typing practice.

chapters.title: Numbers and Counting
chapters.desc: Numbers up to 100, Place value (tens and ones), Comparing numbers.
chapters.practice: Write the number name for 47. What is the place value of 3 in 37?

chapters.title: Operations
chapters.desc: Addition and subtraction of 2-digit numbers. Introduction to multiplication as repeated addition.
chapters.practice: There are 37 students in a class. 15 more students join the class. How many students are there now?

chapters.title: Shapes and Patterns
chapters.desc: 2D and 3D shapes. Straight, curved, horizontal, vertical lines. Simple patterns.

chapters.title: Time and Calendar
chapters.desc: Reading clock to o'clock and half past. Days of the week, months, seasons.

chapters.title: Money
chapters.desc: Indian coins and notes. Counting money.
chapters.practice: Count coins to find the total money. Choose coins to make 15 rupees.

chapters.title: Data Handling
chapters.desc: Simple tables/picture graphs and 'which is more/less'. Basic logical puzzles.
chapters.practice: Look at a picture graph: 'How many children like apples?'

chapters.title: Literature
chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.title: Paint & Typing
chapters.desc: Using MS Paint, Keyboard typing practice.

chapters.title: Numbers up to 1000
chapters.desc: Number names, place value, comparing, ordering. Expanding numbers.
chapters.practice: Write the expanded form of 649.

chapters.title: Addition and Subtraction
chapters.desc: 2-digit and 3-digit addition and subtraction with and without carry/borrowing.
chapters.formula: a + b = sum, a - b = difference

chapters.title: Multiplication and Division
chapters.desc: Multiplication as repeated addition. Division as sharing equally.
chapters.practice: Solve: 7 x 8 = ? and 35 ÷ 5 = ?

chapters.title: Shapes, Designs and Patterns
chapters.desc: 2D shapes, symmetry, basic angles. Number and shape patterns.
chapters.practice: Find the perimeter of a square of side 7 cm.

chapters.title: Length, Weight, Capacity
chapters.desc: Length (m, cm), Weight (kg, g), Capacity (l, ml).
chapters.practice: How many centimeters are there in 4 meters?

chapters.title: Time
chapters.desc: Days, months, seasons, reading clock, time conversion.
chapters.practice: Convert 2 hours 15 minutes into minutes.

chapters.title: Money
chapters.desc: Rupees and Paise, coins, notes, addition/subtraction of money.
chapters.practice: If one notebook costs ₹18, what is the cost of 6 notebooks?

chapters.title: Data Handling
chapters.desc: Tables, picture graphs, simple bar graphs (Smart Charts).
chapters.practice: 12 children like chocolate, 8 like vanilla. How many more like chocolate than vanilla?

chapters.title: Literature
chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.title: Paint & Typing
chapters.desc: Using MS Paint, Keyboard typing practice.

chapters.title: Numbers up to 5 Digits
chapters.desc: Place value up to thousands, rounding to nearest 10 and 100, number names.
chapters.practice: Write the expanded form of 4763. Round 437 to the nearest 10.

chapters.title: Addition and Subtraction
chapters.desc: 3-digit and 4-digit operations with carry and borrowing. Word problems.
chapters.formula: a + b = sum, a - b = difference

chapters.title: Multiplication and Division
chapters.desc: Multiplying up to 3-digit numbers. Division with remainders. Tables 1-20.

chapters.title: Halves and Quarters
chapters.desc: Introduction to fractions. Simple addition and subtraction of fractions.
chapters.formula: Half of x = x/2, Quarter of x = x/4
chapters.practice: Find half of 36.

chapters.title: Measurement (Length, Weight, Capacity)
chapters.desc: Km, m, cm; kg and g; L and mL. Conversions and comparisons.
chapters.practice: How many centimeters are there in 5 m 30 cm?

chapters.title: Time and Calendar
chapters.desc: Reading clocks, days, months, years, and identifying leap years.
chapters.practice: How many minutes are there in 2 hours 15 minutes?

chapters.title: Perimeter and Area
chapters.desc: Calculating perimeter of rectangles and squares. Basic idea of area.
chapters.formula: P = 2 x (L + B) for Rectangle, P = 4 x Side for Square
chapters.practice: Find the perimeter of a rectangle of length 12 m and breadth 8 m.

chapters.title: Money
chapters.desc: Rupees to paise conversion. Adding and subtracting money.
chapters.practice: Cost of one pen is ₹12.45. What is the cost of 20 such pens?

chapters.title: Shapes, Views and Patterns
chapters.desc: 3D objects, top/front/side views, circles (radius/diameter), number/shape patterns.
chapters.practice: Draw the top view of a brick.

chapters.title: Smart Charts
chapters.desc: Data handling using tables, pictographs, and bar graphs.
chapters.practice: If 14 children like chocolate and 10 like vanilla, how many more like chocolate?

chapters.title: Literature
chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.title: Paint & Typing
chapters.desc: Using MS Paint, Keyboard typing practice.

chapters.title: Number System
chapters.desc: Understanding numbers, place value, and basic operations (+, -, *, /).

chapters.title: Geometry
chapters.desc: Basic shapes like Square, Rectangle, Circle.

chapters.title: Literature
chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.title: Paint & Typing
chapters.desc: Using MS Paint, Keyboard typing practice.

chapters.title: Mensuration
chapters.desc: Calculating area and perimeter of complex shapes.

chapters.title: Data Handling
chapters.desc: Mean, Median, Mode, and Bar Graphs.
chapters.formula: Mean = Sum of values / Number of values

chapters.title: Force and Pressure
chapters.desc: Push or pull on an object.

chapters.title: Light
chapters.formula: Angle of Incidence = Angle of Reflection

chapters.title: History
chapters.desc: The French Revolution, Nationalism in India.

chapters.desc: Prose and Poetry chapters as per NCERT.

chapters.desc: Block-based coding like Scratch or basic HTML.
